title: VS / Sable Hose Connectors
description: Better transport between Valkyrien Skies ships & Aeronautics(Sable).
body:
![intro-v3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c54184de061d9485e335cefb809851f7ae59911c.jpeg)

# I've experimentally added support for create:Aeronautics (sable).
Released v0.1.0 for NeoForge 1.21.1.
This version includes experimental support for Create: Aeronautics.

If you encounter any issues, please report them on GitHub:
https://github.com/M-K2525/VS_Hose_Connectors/issues

# VS/Sable Hose Connectors

VS/Sable Hose Connectors is an addon mod that requires Create.
When either Valkyrien Skies or Sable (Create: Aeronautics) is installed, it allows the transfer of fluids, items, rotational power, and energy between ships or sublevels.

![intro2-v3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b727d4a16d064c7a59ef239febdaaf18ef09683.jpeg)

## Tested and confirmed to work only with the following versions:

VS Hose Connectors 0.0.9
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.4.13
- Valkyrien Skies v2.4.9
- Create 6.0.8


VS/Sable Hose Connectors 0.1.1
- Minecraft 1.21.1
- NeoForge 21.1.227
- Create 6.0.10
- Create Aeronautics 1.1.3
- Sable 1.1.3

## Added Blocks
### ● Hose Connector

The basic block for fluid transport.
Two connectors can be manually linked using the Create wrench, allowing fluids to be transferred between them.

By connecting Create pipes to the bottom of the connector, fluid transportation between ships becomes possible.

### ● Magnet Hose Connector

Unlike the Hose Connector, this block has a facing direction.
When two connectors are placed facing each other, they automatically connect.

The connection can be disabled by applying a redstone signal.

As with the Hose Connector, connecting Create pipes enables fluid transportation between ships.

### ● Item Hose Connector

Similar to the Hose Connector, two connectors can be manually linked using the Create wrench.
By applying rotational force (32 RPM or higher) from the side, items can be transported between them.

When transporting items, rotational force must be applied only to the source connector.

### ● Item Magnet Hose Connector

Like the Magnet Hose Connector, two blocks placed facing each other will automatically connect.
Items can be transported by applying rotational force (32 RPM or higher) from the side.

As with the Item Hose Connector, rotational force should be applied only to the source connector when transporting items.

### ● Electric Wire Connector

A block that transfers energy by manually linking two connectors using the Create wrench.
It allows energy transfer between ships.

### ● Electric Magnet Wire Connector

Similar to the Magnet Hose Connector, this block automatically connects when placed facing another one.

### ● Chain Connector

When connectors are linked, they transfer rotational force.
This allows rotational power to be transmitted between ships.

### ● Magnet Chain Connector

A chain connector that automatically connects when two connectors are brought close together facing each other.
